name: 40 MG Telmisartan And Chlorthalidone Tablets
about: 40 MG Telmisartan And Chlorthalidone Tablets are a combination medication used to treat high blood pressure. Telmisartan belongs to a class of drugs known as angiotensin receptor blockers (ARBs) and Chlorthalidone is a diuretic that helps the body get rid of excess fluid. These tablets are manufactured in India and come in a physical form of tablets. The recommended dosage of these tablets is 40mg as per the doctors suggestion. These general medicines are effective in regulating blood pressure and improving overall cardiovascular health. To ensure the quality and effectiveness of the tablets, it is recommended to store them in a dry and cool place.
